cases.title: ชมพู่พาลูกเยี่ยมยายหนิง สวน 1 ไร่

failures.detail: Circle slot uses airport family photo (Suvarnabhumi) instead of garden/nature scene. Story is about visiting grandmother's garden but circle shows airport departure.
Instagram screenshot with UI elements (username 'chomismaterialgirl', play button overlay) used as source in main hero slot.
Main hero is children near Christmas tree (indoor event, unrelated to garden/nature story). Should show garden/nature activity scene.

cases.title: ชมพู่ อารยา พาลูกเยี่ยมยายหนิง ปลูกผัก

failures.detail: Chompoo press interview (with ET Thailand/true4U/ช่อง 24 mic logos) dominates bottom-right support slot. Interview is unrelated to nature/garden story.
Circle shows airport family photo (Q18 Qatar First Class gate visible). Should show Yai Ning or garden scene.

cases.title: เบียร์ ยอมรับตรง ๆ ว่า สิ่งที่ทำให้เขารู้สึกดีกับ โอ๋ ภัคจีรา

failures.detail: ALL slots use images with massive Thai text overlays. Main hero slot: Dara2you news page screenshot with full article text. Support slots: Facebook social media posts with comments and reactions. Circle: news interview screenshot with 'อาจารย์เบียร์ คนตื่นธรรม' text overlay.
Bottom-left support image is a pre-made news collage with wedding photo + quote text embedded in a designed graphic frame.
Upper-right image is a YouTube/news program thumbnail showing เบียร์ with large Thai quote text '"จะบอกกูโง่ก็ได้..."'. This is another outlet's finished thumbnail, not a clean source photo.
Score 5 should never be saved as SUCCESS. Zero clean source photos were used. Every slot contains text-heavy news screenshots. This cover should have been blocked or flagged NEED_MANUAL_REVIEW.

cases.title: ชื่นชม เจ๊แห้ง แม่ค้าหัวใจทองคำ

failures.detail: Main hero is MGR Online (ผู้จัดการออนไลน์) news screenshot with MGR logo watermark in top-left corner. Circle slot uses news interview screenshot with 'ข่าว 23' (channel 23) lower-third banner.
Support image (lottery ticket in trash) has large Thai text overlay: '2ใบที่พบ ในถังขยะ แต่รรางวัล ที่ 1 ที่อยู่ใบกลางหายไป' with decorative stars. This is a pre-made news graphic, not a clean photo.
Main visual shows a sad elderly woman face (from news broadcast). The story is about a market vendor's kindness/honesty — main should show the vendor or the heroic action.

cases.title: ชมพู่ อารยา พาลูกๆ เรียนรู้ธรรมชาติกับยายหนิง
cases.notes: Clean source photos. Children playing in nature/water. Garden scene. Circle shows mother+child in stream. Good story-type match.

cases.title: (tye.chutima — ส่งลูกไปเรียนต่างประเทศ)

failures.detail: Source includes Instagram story screenshot with UI elements (username 'tye.chutima', timestamp '15 ชม.', reply bar, and video play button visible).
One source has 'Thank you' text with hearts and 'picture board' / 'le girl' captions visible — Instagram story text overlay.

cases.title: (Celebrity family — mother-daughter photos)
cases.notes: Clean source photos from Instagram/personal. Good portrait + activity mix. No text overlays.

cases.title: (Award ceremony — mother and daughter at royal foundation)
cases.notes: Clean event photos. Award ceremony context. Good story-activity match.

cases.title: (Celebrity family — mother with children, colorful family)

failures.detail: Circle image has 'สประกอบ' Thai text visible at bottom — likely cropped from a news interview lower-third.

cases.title: (หมอโบว์ รักษาช้าง — แม่ป่วยอัลไซเมอร์)

failures.detail: Bottom support slot uses One31 TV interview screenshot with large Thai text: 'หมอโบว์ รักษาช้าง' + 'แม่ป่วยอัลไซเมอร์'. Has channel logo and program name banner.
Circle slot contains a 4-panel collage image (2x2 grid showing elephant + หมอโบว์ in different poses). This is a pre-made news graphic, not a single clean photo.

Main visual is dominated by elephant close-up face. Story is about หมอโบว์ caring for her Alzheimer's mother — elephant is occupation context only, not the core story. Main should show mother-care or หมอโบว์ with her mother.
Elephant takes up >50% of hero slot visual weight. The person (หมอโบว์) is secondary. This makes it look like an 'elephant news' rather than a 'family sacrifice' story.

cases.title: (หมอโบว์ — elephant + Alzheimer mother variant)

failures.detail: Multiple slots use Thai text overlay sources: 'อัลไซเมอร์' text in red, 'เดินไม่ได้' text, 'และแม่อัลไซเมอร์' lower-third banner. All from news broadcasts.
Circle slot is a 4-panel collage (same as CASE-010) — pre-made news graphic.
Elephant completely dominates main visual (~70% of hero area). Story about mother care is invisible. Cover looks like wildlife/zoo news.
Text overlays everywhere, collage in circle, wrong dominant subject. Should have been flagged NEED_MANUAL_REVIEW.

cases.title: (หมอโบว์ — คุณหมอเคียงข้างน้องช้าง variant)

failures.detail: Main hero slot: large Thai headline text 'คุณหมอเคียง ของ น้องช้าง' covers >40% of the image. This is a news outlet's cover page/article header, not a clean photo. Also shows 'Made (วันนี้ดีที่สุด)' branding and 'หมอโบว์ - สัตว์แพทย์หญิงรัชดาภ...' subtitle.
Support slot uses มติชน (Matichon) news article layout. Circle slot uses MCOT HD interview screenshot with program branding.
Main image is literally another outlet's cover/header image. The system should NEVER reuse another page's finished cover as its own source.

topFailurePatterns: TEXT_OVERLAY — news screenshots with Thai headlines used as source images (8/12 cases)
NEWS_THUMBNAIL — finished covers/thumbnails from other outlets reused as source (5/12)
WRONG_MAIN — dominant visual doesn't match story core (3/12, especially หมอโบว์ elephant cases)
COLLAGE — 4-panel collage graphics from news used in circle/support slots (3/12)
